---
title: "RDM 2.0 Data Refresh"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  message: true
  warning: false
---

Pulls a fresh copy of all RDM 2.0 data from REDCap and writes it to a
Posit Connect pin (`rdm_complete_raw`). All IMSLU apps read from this
pin instead of hitting the REDCap API directly, keeping startup times
under a second.

Schedule this content to run every 30–60 minutes on Posit Connect Cloud.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(gmed)
library(pins)
library(httr)

# Required for institutional REDCap SSL certificate
httr::set_config(httr::config(ssl_verifypeer = FALSE, ssl_verifyhost = FALSE))

# Validate required environment variables
required_vars <- c("REDCAP_URL", "RDM_TOKEN", "CONNECT_SERVER", "CONNECT_API_KEY")
missing_vars  <- required_vars[!nzchar(Sys.getenv(required_vars))]
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required environment variables: ", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: connect-board
# Posit Connect Cloud does NOT auto-inject these — must be set as
# environment variables on the content in Connect Cloud settings.
board <- pins::board_connect(
  server = Sys.getenv("CONNECT_SERVER"),
  key    = Sys.getenv("CONNECT_API_KEY")
)
cat("Connected to pin board\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: pull-redcap
start_time <- Sys.time()
cat("Starting REDCap pull at", format(start_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")

rdm_raw <- gmed::load_rdm_complete(
  redcap_url   = Sys.getenv("REDCAP_URL"),
  rdm_token    = Sys.getenv("RDM_TOKEN"),
  raw_or_label = "raw"
)

elapsed <- round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "secs")), 1)
cat("REDCap pull complete in", elapsed, "seconds\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: write-pin
pins::pin_write(
  board,
  rdm_raw,
  name        = "rdm_complete_raw",
  type        = "rds",
  description = paste("RDM 2.0 raw data — refreshed", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))
)
cat("Pin written successfully\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: summary
cat("---\n")
cat("Residents in pin:", nrow(rdm_raw$residents), "\n")
cat("Forms included:  ", length(rdm_raw$all_forms), "\n")
cat("Completed at:    ", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
```
